title: lasianthus setulosus
intro: Lasianthus setulosus is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lasianthus setulosus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lasianthus setulosus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent.
